content: {"file": "src/compiler/compilation.ts", "summary": "This file contains logic for compiling Angular components and directives, including setting up metadata, resolving resources, and defining compilation scopes.", "rules": [{"name": "Compile Component", "description": "Compiles a component with given metadata, handling template resolution and style inclusion based on the provided URLs or inline content.", "conditions": ["metadata.templateUrl is defined", "metadata.styleUrls is not empty"], "actions": ["Queue resolution of component resources", "Define directive factory definition", "Compile component using Angular compiler"]}, {"name": "Set Compilation Scope", "description": "Determines and sets the compilation scope for components, including directives and pipes that are part of or imported by the component.", "conditions": ["Component is standalone"], "actions": ["Use runtime dependencies tracker to get standalone component scope", "Define directive and pipe definitions based on resolved imports"]}], "dependencies": ["getCompilerFacade", "directiveMetadata", "addDirectiveFactoryDef"]}
